name: Remove demo-mode auth bypass and DEMO_MODE bootstrap paths
motivation: Demo-mode login shortcuts, seeded demo personas/data, and demo heartbeat cron jobs are template artifacts that are outside PRD scope and can weaken security posture or create misleading runtime behavior.
intended_experience: Authentication and startup behavior follow production-like paths only; demo-only bypasses and synthetic task churn are removed from normal runtime codepaths.
constraints: Do not break test-mode specific backdoors that are intentionally gated for CI only.
Preserve superuser bootstrap behavior that is still required for first-run administration.
Update docs/runbooks to remove DEMO_MODE references where no longer valid.
